name: Vegetable, Bean and Pasta Soup
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Penne or other tubular pasta
15 oz Canned cannellini beans -- rinsed, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring broth and vermouth to a boil in a heavy large pot or Dutch oven over medium heat.
2. Add onion, fennel, and garlic. Cover and cook until just tender, about 10 minutes.
3. Add tomatoes, pasta, zucchini, and squash; cook until pasta is almost tender, about 15 minutes.
4. Add beans and green onions. Cook until pasta and vegetables are tender and soup is thick, about 10 minutes.
